title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 269.070 - Issuance of permits to transport
text:
269.070.  Issuance of permits to transport. — When the applicant has satisfied all requirements imposed by this chapter and the regulations promulgated thereunder, the state veterinarian shall issue to such applicant a permit, which shall be attached to each vehicle so used, which permit shall entitle him to operate each vehicle for the purpose of transporting dead animals to authorized disposal plants or substations.
(L. 1941 p. 290 § 14493e, A.L. 1992 H.B. 878)
